name: lobby-fullscreen-display
desc: REJECTED diagnostic patch. It keeps the lobby renderer/UI virtual basis at the original 1024x768 while requesting a 1920x1080 display mode through FUN_004e7570. Live use showed this stretches the UI on the fullscreen display path, so it must not be part of the playable/remaster default stack.
verified: RE-confirmed 2026-06-20: FUN_0051a370 is the only caller of FUN_004e7570. Its case 2/9 sequence calls FUN_00401760(0x400,0x300) first, then FUN_004e7570(1, window, 0x400,0x300). FUN_004e7570 @0x004e75dc has `jne 0x4e75ff`; the taken branch reads DAT_007c1b4c+0x2a3d8/0x2a3dc and ignores caller args. Patching 75 21 -> 90 90 falls through to the existing caller-arg path. Second-call push sites only are retargeted to 1920x1080; first-call virtual-size sites stay 1024x768. Needs live visual confirmation after rebuild.

patches.note: FUN_004e7570 fullscreen path: disable DAT_007c1b4c virtual-size branch so the helper uses its width/height call arguments.
case 2 second call, display height push 0x300(768) -> 1080. First FUN_00401760 height push remains 0x300.
case 2 second call, display width push 0x400(1024) -> 1920. First FUN_00401760 width push remains 0x400.
case 9 second call, display height push 0x300(768) -> 1080. First FUN_00401760 height push remains 0x300.
case 9 second call, display width push 0x400(1024) -> 1920. First FUN_00401760 width push remains 0x400.
